'''Mogos''' were creatures with hooves and ten legs found on [[Roon/Legends|Roon]], though like most of the planet's fauna, they were not believed to be indigenous.<ref name="GatORW" /> Their shaggy fur was used to keep a wild mogo warm in the mountains.

The mogo was domesticated as mounts. A typical mogo could carry three Human-sized beings with no problem.
